sentence: 这条路禁止重型车辆通行。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù jìnzhǐ zhòngxíng chēliàng tōngxíng.
english: Heavy vehicles are not allowed on this road.

sentence: 天气愈来愈热，记得多喝水。
pinyin: Tiānqì yù lái yù rè, jìde duō hē shuǐ.
english: The weather is getting hotter and hotter, so remember to drink more water.

sentence: 节日晚会上有精彩的歌舞表演。
pinyin: Jié rì wǎn huì shàng yǒu jīng cǎi de gē wǔ biǎo yǎn.
english: There were wonderful singing and dancing performances at the holiday show.

sentence: 经济萧条时期，很多店铺关门了。
pinyin: Jīngjì xiāotiáo shíqī, hěn duō diànpù guānmén le.
english: During the economic slump, many shops closed down.

sentence: 她试穿婚纱的时候激动得哭了。
pinyin: Tā shì chuān hūnshā de shíhòu jīdòng de kū le.
english: She burst into tears with excitement when she tried on the wedding dress.

sentence: 她匆匆吃完早饭就出门了。
pinyin: Tā cōngcōng chī wán zǎofàn jiù chūmén le.
english: She hurriedly finished breakfast and headed out the door.

sentence: 公司的层级太多，审批很慢。
pinyin: Gōngsī de cénjí tài duō, shěnpī hěn màn.
english: The company has too many levels of hierarchy, which makes approvals slow.

sentence: 他们购置了一套新房子。
pinyin: Tāmen gòuzhì le yī tào xīn fángzi.
english: They purchased a new home.

sentence: 医生说他得了急性肠胃炎。
pinyin: Yīshēng shuō tā dé le jíxìng chángwèiyán.
english: The doctor said he has acute gastroenteritis.

sentence: 点击左上角的选单可以切换页面。
pinyin: Diǎnjī zuǒ shàngjiǎo de xuǎndān kěyǐ qiēhuàn yèmiàn.
english: Click the menu in the top-left corner to switch pages.

sentence: 具体规定详见附件。
pinyin: Jùtǐ guīdìng xiángjian fùjiàn.
english: The specific rules are detailed in the attachment.

sentence: 各国都希望减少核武的数量。
pinyin: Gèguó dōu xīwàng jiǎnshǎo héwǔ de shùliàng.
english: Every country hopes to reduce the number of nuclear weapons.

sentence: 吃甜食要节制，别太多。
pinyin: Chī tiánshí yào jiézhì, bié tài duō.
english: You should eat sweets in moderation—don't have too many.

sentence: 这条小河是长江的支流。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xiǎohé shì Chángjiāng de zhīliú.
english: This small river is a tributary of the Yangtze.

meaning: To be beneficial, to be good for
sentence: 多喝水利于身体健康。
pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ lìyú shēntǐ jiànkāng.
english: Drinking more water is beneficial to your health.

sentence: 飞机上的座椅可以向后调。
pinyin: Fēijī shàng de zuòyǐ kěyǐ xiàng hòu tiáo.
english: The seats on the plane can be reclined.

sentence: 我们在甲板上看了日落。
pinyin: Wǒmen zài jiǎbǎn shàng kànle rìluò.
english: We watched the sunset from the deck.

sentence: 学校在郊区开了一所分校。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zài jiāoqū kāile yī suǒ fēnxiào.
english: The school opened a branch campus in the suburbs.

sentence: 老师给我们看了一个写作范例。
pinyin: Lǎoshī gěi wǒmen kànle yīgè xiězuò fànlì.
english: The teacher showed us a writing model.

sentence: 遇到长者应该先打招呼。
pinyin: Yùdào zhǎngzhě yīnggāi xiān dǎ zhāohu.
english: You should greet your elders first when you meet them.

sentence: 这款游戏吸引了亿万玩家。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóuxì xīyǐnle yìwàn wánjiā.
english: This game has attracted hundreds of millions of players.

sentence: 他加入了海军陆战队。
pinyin: Tā jiārùle hǎijūn lùzhànduì.
english: He joined the Marine Corps.

meaning: 1. copy; 2. duplicate; 3. transcript; 4. (in online games) instance
sentence: 请保存一份合同副本备用。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎocún yī fèn hétong fùběn bèiyòng.
english: Please keep a copy of the contract for future reference.

sentence: 这栋楼是某财团投资建造的。
pinyin: Zhè dòng lóu shì mǒu cáituán tóuzī jiànzào de.
english: This building was financed and built by a financial group.

sentence: 这位高官今天出席了会议。
pinyin: Zhè wèi gāoguān jīntiān chūxíle huìyì.
english: This high official attended the meeting today.

meaning: 1. mobile game; 2. abbr. for 手機遊戲|手机游戏
sentence: 他上班路上总在玩手游。
pinyin: Tā shàngbān lùshàng zǒng zài wán shǒuyóu.
english: He always plays mobile games on his commute to work.

meaning: 1. high ball; 2. lob (in tennis); 3. golf (abbr. of 高爾夫球|高尔夫球[gāo ěr f
sentence: 他退休后开始打高球。
pinyin: Tā tuìxiū hòu kāishǐ dǎ gāoqiú.
english: He took up golf after retiring.

sentence: 家里插座用的是交流电。
pinyin: Jiālǐ chāzuò yòng de shì jiāoliúdiàn.
english: The outlets at home use alternating current.

meaning: 1. lanes and alleys; 2. neighborhood; 3. lane neighborhoods in parts o
sentence: 她从小住在上海的里弄里。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo zhù zài Shànghǎi de lǐlòng lǐ.
english: She grew up living in a Shanghai lane neighborhood.

sentence: 周末我们去美术馆看了展览。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù měishùguǎn kànle zhǎnlǎn.
english: We went to the art gallery to see an exhibition on the weekend.

sentence: 我们家最近换了光纤宽带。
pinyin: Wǒmen jiā zuìjìn huànle guāngxiān kuāndài.
english: We recently switched to fiber optic broadband at home.

sentence: 医生正在查看病患的情况。
pinyin: Yīshēng zhèngzài chákàn bìnghuàn de qíngkuàng.
english: The doctor is checking on the patient's condition.

sentence: 两家人共用一个停车位。
pinyin: Liǎng jiā rén gòngyòng yīgè tíngchēwèi.
english: Two households share one parking spot.

sentence: 他怎么没来，我真纳闷。
pinyin: Tā zěnme méi lái, wǒ zhēn nàmèn.
english: I'm really puzzled about why he didn't come.

meaning: 1. founder or leader of a religion or sect; 2. (fig.) revered figure
sentence: 他被粉丝们称为时尚教主。
pinyin: Tā bèi fěnsīmen chēng wéi shíshàng jiàozhǔ.
english: He is called the fashion icon by his fans.

meaning: 1. transliteration (rendering phonetic value, e.g. of English words in
sentence: "沙发"是英文sofa的音译。
pinyin: "Shāfā" shì yīngwén sofa de yīnyì.
english: "Shāfā" is a transliteration of the English word "sofa".

sentence: 他在首轮比赛中就被淘汰了。
pinyin: Tā zài shǒulún bǐsài zhōng jiù bèi táotài le.
english: He was eliminated in the first round of the competition.

meaning: 1. birds and animals; 2. creature; 3. beast (brutal person)
sentence: 大家都骂他是禽兽。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu mà tā shì qínshòu.
english: Everyone cursed him for being a beast.

sentence: 他是乒乓球界的名将。
pinyin: Tā shì pīngpāngqiú jiè de míngjiàng.
english: He is a renowned athlete in the world of table tennis.

sentence: 政府已划定了禁止停车的区域。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ yǐ huàdìngle jìnzhǐ tíngchē de qūyù.
english: The government has demarcated the no-parking zones.

sentence: 东方明珠是上海的地标。
pinyin: Dōngfāng Míngzhū shì Shànghǎi de dìbiāo.
english: The Oriental Pearl Tower is a landmark of Shanghai.

sentence: 过度疲劳会影响人的性欲。
pinyin: Guòdù píláo huì yǐngxiǎng rén de xìngyù.
english: Excessive fatigue can affect a person's sex drive.

sentence: 出门别忘了带雨伞。
pinyin: Chūmén bié wàngle dài yǔsǎn.
english: Don't forget to bring an umbrella when you go out.

meaning: small multi-story building; modest house with two or more floors
sentence: 他在郊区买了一栋两层的小楼。
pinyin: Tā zài jiāoqū mǎi le yī dòng liǎng céng de xiǎo lóu.
english: He bought a small two-story house in the suburbs.

meaning: to keep for use; to retain sth; to keep sb in his job
sentence: 公司决定把这位优秀员工留用。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng bǎ zhè wèi yōuxiù yuángōng liú yòng.
english: The company decided to retain this outstanding employee.

meaning: to submit a written piece (letter, article, opinion piece etc)
sentence: 他向报社投书，反映小区停车问题。
pinyin: Tā xiàng bàoshè tóu shū, fǎnyìng xiǎoqū tíngchē wèntí.
english: He submitted a letter to the newspaper reflecting on the parking problems in his community.

meaning: traffic rules; rules of the road
sentence: 开车一定要遵守交通规则。
pinyin: Kāi chē yīdìng yào zūnshǒu jiāo tōng guī zé.
english: You must always follow traffic rules when driving.

sentence: 这幅画保留了原初的设计风格。
pinyin: Zhè fú huà bǎoliú le yuán chū de shèjì fēnggé.
english: This painting has preserved its original design style.

sentence: 她每天晚上都喜欢画画放松心情。
pinyin: Tā měitiān wǎnshàng dōu xǐhuān huà huà fàngsōng xīnqíng.
english: She likes to draw every evening to relax.

meaning: to close the market (for the day); to close (a market, shop etc) for b
sentence: 今天股市收市时，上证指数涨了一点。
pinyin: Jīntiān gǔshì shōu shì shí, Shàngzhèng zhǐshù zhǎng le yīdiǎn.
english: At today's market close, the Shanghai Composite Index rose slightly.
